# list_project_subscriptions query

## 001_select_subscriptions.sql

### SQL種別

`SELECT`

### SQLの概要

Projectが利用可能なAPI一覧を返すため、承認済みsubscriptionを取得する。

### 利用するテーブル

- `project_api_subscriptions`
- `projects`
- `apis`
- `api_gateway_stages`
- `api_cognito_scopes`
- `project_cognito_client_scopes`
- `project_cognito_clients`
- `project_members`

### 引数

| DDLカラム | 項目 | 日本語名 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| <code>project_members.member_principal_id</code><br><code>projects.owner_principal_id</code> | <code>actor_principal_id</code> | メンバーのprincipal。<br>プロジェクトオーナーのprincipal。 | <code>VARCHAR(256)</code><br><code>VARCHAR(256)</code> | no<br>no |
| <code>project_api_subscriptions.project_id</code> | <code>project_id</code> | 利用権を持つProject ID。 | <code>UUID</code> | no |
| <code>project_cognito_clients.app_client_id</code> | <code>app_client_id</code> | Cognito App Client ID。 | <code>VARCHAR(128)</code> | no |
| <code>-</code> | <code>is_hub_admin</code> | - | <code>Any</code> | no |
| <code>project_api_subscriptions.approved_at</code> | <code>after_approved_at</code> | 承認日時。 | <code>TIMESTAMPTZ</code> | no |
| <code>-</code> | <code>limit</code> | - | <code>Any</code> | no |

### 戻り値

| DDLカラム | 項目 | 日本語名 | 型 | nullable |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| <code>project_api_subscriptions.subscription_id</code> | <code>subscription_id</code> | 利用権ID。 | <code>UUID</code> | no |
| <code>project_api_subscriptions.api_id</code> | <code>api_id</code> | 利用可能なAPI ID。 | <code>UUID</code> | no |
| <code>project_api_subscriptions.api_stage_id</code> | <code>api_stage_id</code> | 利用可能なAPI stage ID。 | <code>UUID</code> | no |
| <code>project_api_subscriptions.approved_auth_mode</code> | <code>approved_auth_mode</code> | 承認された認証方式。PUBLIC_PKCE、CLIENT_CREDENTIALS、BOTH。 | <code>VARCHAR(30)</code> | no |
| <code>project_api_subscriptions.approved_at</code> | <code>approved_at</code> | 承認日時。 | <code>TIMESTAMPTZ</code> | no |
| <code>apis.api_code</code> | <code>api_code</code> | 人が読めるAPIコード。例: billing-api-v1。 | <code>VARCHAR(100)</code> | no |
| <code>apis.name</code> | <code>api_name</code> | API表示名。 | <code>VARCHAR(200)</code> | no |
| <code>api_gateway_stages.apigw_stage_name</code> | <code>stage_name</code> | API Gateway stage名。例: prod。 | <code>VARCHAR(128)</code> | no |
| <code>api_gateway_stages.invoke_url</code> | <code>invoke_url</code> | execute-apiの呼び出しURL。 | <code>TEXT</code> | no |
| <code>api_cognito_scopes.scope_full_name</code> | <code>scope_full_name</code> | Resource Server識別子を含むscope名。例: api-hub/api:{apiId}:invoke。 | <code>VARCHAR(600)</code> | no |

### 条件

- `JOIN ON projects.project_id = project_api_subscriptions.project_id`
- `JOIN ON apis.api_id = project_api_subscriptions.api_id`
- `JOIN ON api_gateway_stages.api_stage_id = project_api_subscriptions.api_stage_id`
- `JOIN ON api_cognito_scopes.api_id = project_api_subscriptions.api_id`
- `JOIN ON project_cognito_client_scopes.subscription_id = project_api_subscriptions.subscription_id`
- `JOIN ON project_cognito_clients.project_cognito_client_id = project_cognito_client_scopes.project_cognito_client_id`
- `JOIN ON project_members.project_id = projects.project_id AND project_members.member_principal_id = @actor_principal_id`
- `WHERE project_api_subscriptions.project_id = @project_id AND (projects.owner_principal_id = @actor_principal_id OR NOT project_members.project_member_id IS NULL OR project_cognito_clients.app_client_id = @app_client_id OR @is_hub_admin = TRUE) AND (@after_approved_at IS NULL OR project_api_subscriptions.approved_at < @after_approved_at)`
